    A

    assertBoardState(EasySokoban, int) - Static method in class tests.TestUtils
    Asserts that current board counters and composition match expectations.
    assertJustCreatedBoardState(EasySokoban, int, int, int) - Static method in class tests.TestUtils
    Asserts the full state right after creating a board.
    assertPlayerInPosition(EasySokoban, int, int) - Static method in class tests.TestUtils
    Asserts player position coordinates.
    assertTypeInPosition(EasySokoban, int, int, int) - Static method in class tests.TestUtils
    Asserts cell type at a specific board position.

    C

    checkHasBorderAndCorrectNumberOfObjects(int[][]) - Static method in class domain.EasySokoban
    Validates border and object counts for a board matrix.
    checkValidDirection(char) - Static method in class domain.EasySokoban
    Validates a movement direction character.
    createDefaultSokoban() - Static method in class domain.EasySokoban
    Builds the predefined default game board.
    createSokobanFromBoard(int[][]) - Static method in class domain.EasySokoban
    Builds a game from a custom board after validating it.

    E

    EasySokoban - Class in domain
    Main domain model for an Easy Sokoban game board and interactions.
    EasySokoban() - Constructor for class domain.EasySokoban
    Creates a game with default dimensions and random valid layout.
    EasySokoban(int, int) - Constructor for class domain.EasySokoban
    Creates a game with custom dimensions and random valid layout.

    G

    getBoard() - Method in class domain.EasySokoban
    Returns the current board encoded as type ids.
    getCellsPerType() - Method in class domain.EasySokoban
    Returns the expected count per object type for a board size.
    getDefaultBoard() - Static method in class domain.EasySokoban
    Returns the predefined default board.
    getHeight() - Method in class domain.EasySokoban
    Returns board height.
    getPlayerPosition() - Method in class domain.EasySokoban
    Returns current player coordinates.
    getTestBoard() - Static method in class tests.TestUtils
    Returns the static board used by tests.
    getTestSokoban() - Static method in class tests.TestUtils
    Creates a Sokoban instance from the shared test board.
    getTypes() - Static method in class domain.EasySokoban
    Returns available symbolic cell types.
    getWidth() - Method in class domain.EasySokoban
    Returns board width.

    M

    main(String[]) - Static method in class presentation.SokobanGUI
    Launches the graphical application.
    move(char) - Method in class domain.EasySokoban
    Moves the player in a specific direction.
    MOVE_FIXED_CELL - Static variable in exception class domain.SokobanException
     
    moveDown() - Method in class domain.EasySokoban
    Moves the player down.
    moveLeft() - Method in class domain.EasySokoban
    Moves the player left.
    moveRight() - Method in class domain.EasySokoban
    Moves the player right.
    moveUp() - Method in class domain.EasySokoban
    Moves the player up.

    Verifies that attempting to move into a non-empty target cell throws an exception.

    shouldThrowWhenMovesAndThereAreSeveralObjectsNotLettingItMove(EasySokoban, int, int, char) - Static method in class tests.TestUtils
    Verifies that moving into a chain of blocked objects throws an impossible-move exception.

    SokobanException - Exception Class in domain
    Domain-specific checked exception for invalid Sokoban operations.
    SokobanException(String) - Constructor for exception class domain.SokobanException
    Creates an exception with the given detail message.
    SokobanGUI - Class in presentation
    Swing user interface for playing Easy Sokoban.
    SokobanGUI() - Constructor for class presentation.SokobanGUI
    Creates and initializes the Sokoban GUI.
